stop_reason_detail: Training was manually terminated after epoch 5 because the spec-conformant test-set metrics (argmax+50c) were never re-checked during training; my proxy weighted-mean val RPA dropped monotonically from 0.656 at step 10000 to ~0.20 by epoch 5, which I mis-read as catastrophic overfitting. Post-train evaluation revealed the best.pt at step 10000 actually IMPROVES on all 3 test sets vs baseline. The remaining 4+ epochs of training did not produce a better best.pt (best.pt mtime stuck at 21:59 of day 1, val pass at step 10000).
